query:
-- Tag services that share the same customer + monthlyRevenue with a group ID
-- Group ID = customerExternalId + '_' + revenue value (deterministic, no randomness)
UPDATE services s
JOIN (
  SELECT customerExternalId, monthlyRevenue, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM services
  WHERE monthlyRevenue > 0
    AND (billingItemId IS NULL OR billingItemId = '')
    AND LOWER(billingPlatform) LIKE '%sasboss%'
  GROUP BY customerExternalId, monthlyRevenue
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) grp ON grp.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId 
      AND grp.monthlyRevenue = s.monthlyRevenue
      AND (s.billingItemId IS NULL OR s.billingItemId = '')
      AND LOWER(s.billingPlatform) LIKE '%sasboss%'
SET s.revenueGroupId = CONCAT(s.customerExternalId, '_rev_', REPLACE(CAST(s.monthlyRevenue AS CHAR), '.', '_'));
